overview.description: The SAP SE ADRhedged (SAPH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SAP SE Sponsored ADR index. The fund provides exposure to SAP SE ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of SAP SE, in its local market, to US investors. SAPH was launched on Jan 3, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
